title: Executive Order 9098—Modification of Executive Order No. 8507 of August 8, 1940, Withdrawing Public Lands for Use of the War Department as an Anti-Aircraft Firing Range

flags.justification: A narrow, technical land-withdrawal modification under existing statutory authority.
A land-status action creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A permanent boundary modification, not a temporary-authority grant.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed; the order carefully retains the main access road even as adjacent land is released.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. Notable for the deliberate retention of the main access road even as adjacent land is released from the withdrawal.
